top_signals.title: Japan’s ruling party advances proposal to build national AI-blockchain financial system
top_signals.summary: Japan's LDP formally approved a policy proposal to build a next-generation financial system based on blockchain and AI.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Old Spanish Hen? Estrella snaps up Greene King beer brand in UK expansion
top_signals.summary: The British arm of Spanish beer giant Estrella is set to snap up Greene King’s iconic Old Speckled Hen beer as it continues to expand in the UK. Damm UK, the British arm of Barcelona based brewer S.A. Damm – which owns Estrella – will take on the entire arm of Old Speckled Hen beers, [...]
